title: Grootbrak Grabadoo celebrates 21 years of cycling and camaraderie
description: GREAK BRAK RIVER NEWS - The Garden...
bodyText:
GREAK BRAK RIVER NEWS - The Garden Route's beloved outdoor event, GrootbrakGrabadoo, returns to Great Brak River on 31 December, marking its 21st anniversary.

This iconic cycling and walking event promises an unforgettable experience for participants of all ages and skill levels.


> Cycling trails and fun walk


Choose from four mountain bike tracks (15km, 36km, 58km, and 72km) or a scenic 4.8km fun walk through the picturesque coastal hamlet. Route coordinator Alewijn Dippenaar ensures breathtaking tracks through the Garden Route's stunning floral kingdom.

Family Fun Day

Grootbrak Grabadoo is a cherished Iconic Mossel Bay, Garden Route institution, offering:

- Top-class mountain biking for all skill levels
- Fun walk for runners, walkers, families, and pets
- Medals and buffs for participants
- Unforgettable memories

Community Involvement

The event supports local charities and empowers the community through volunteer opportunities and fundraising.

Event Details

- Date: 31 December
- Time: 06:00
- Location: Great Brak Sport Grounds, Lang Street
- Online entries close: 30 December
- Pre-entries: 30 December (08:00-17:00) and 31 December (06:00 - 06:30)


> Safety Reminder


Helmets are mandatory for cyclists.

Support and Contact

Grootbrak Grabadoo is proudly supported by local businesses. For more information, follow Grootbrak Grabadoo on Facebook or contact:

- Mimi: 084 583 3144   | [email protected]
- Alewijn:  082 457 5675   | [email protected]

Join the celebration and make the 21st Grootbrak Grabadoo a highlight of your festive season!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
